menu_items.name: Wonton Soup
menu_items.description: Pork and shrimp filled wontons in a savory chicken broth.

menu_items.name: Hot and Sour Soup
menu_items.description: A spicy and tangy broth with tofu, mushrooms, bamboo shoots, and egg.

menu_items.name: Egg Drop Soup
menu_items.description: Classic silky egg drop soup with scallions in a light broth.

menu_items.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
menu_items.description: Tender chicken slices with noodles in a rich chicken broth.

menu_items.name: Vegetable Soup
menu_items.description: A medley of fresh seasonal vegetables in a light vegetable broth.

menu_items.name: Corn and Egg Soup
menu_items.description: Sweet corn and egg in a creamy, comforting broth.

menu_items.name: Seafood Tofu Soup
menu_items.description: Fresh seafood and silken tofu in a ginger-scented broth.

menu_items.name: Chicken and Rice Soup
menu_items.description: Hearty soup with tender chicken pieces and rice in seasoned broth.

menu_items.name: Beef with Noodle Soup
menu_items.description: Sliced beef with soft noodles in a rich, savory beef broth.

menu_items.name: Miso Soup
menu_items.description: Traditional miso broth with tofu, seaweed, and scallions.

menu_items.name: Tom Yum Soup
menu_items.description: Spicy and sour Thai-style soup with shrimp, mushrooms, and lemongrass.
